text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I head out to observe a winning concert.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ngh... There simply must be a way to overcome this dilemma in a more excellent fashion!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, yes. I'm gathering reference and
preparing for my inevitable winning concert!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To all Umamusume, the winning concert is a place
where they can truly shine. However! There is but
one major issue!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that is... the matter of time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I only get to perform but a single song! How can I
possibly show the audience the full extent of my
charm in so little time?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if only they would allow us to increase the
tempo of the pieces! Perhaps then I could
squeeze in a few more!
choice_data_list:
It's better to perform with everything you've got
within the time you're allotted.
It's important to think outside the box.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Perform with everything I've got? Ah! That's it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Rather than risk overstaying my welcome and
becoming a bore, I should use my time to leave
an impact! Is my interpretation correct?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! What an exemplary suggestion!
That's quite astute of you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even if it is only a single song, I'm certain I can
put on the most memorable performance for the
audience!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Time to create a dazzling performance that only
I, T.M. Opera O, am capable of!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Yes, that is exactly what I shall do!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Some day, I shall claim the title of Centurial
Overlord and illuminate the world with my
presence!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As the sun shines unfettered in the sky, so, too,
must I reign free of any restraints!
